series_metadata.series_description: The purpose of this record series is to keep all information pertaining to closed cases that were handled by OLRS staff. Information contained within may include all or part of the following: questionnaire pertaining to background of client, requests for assistance, all correspondence, copies of various legal pleadings, investigation reports, attorney's notes, and medical records.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: five years from date of last activity on case
